root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.application_fee ,substr ( PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, localtimestamp),0,2) as age ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_id ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount
,( select pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X' ) from sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno where sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.paid_dividen = '1' /*เงินปันผล*/ ) as bank_acc_no
from sc_mem_m_application_form ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_mem_m_share_mem
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_code = sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control not in ('80000','90000') --and substr ( PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, localtimestamp),0,2) between '!age_life_1!' and '!age_life_2!'
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_date between '01/01/2023' and '07/11/2023' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no asc
